raw_title: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_en: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_zh: 不均衡的回响：性别对台湾候选人个人化与选民反应的差异化影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨性别如何影响台湾政治中候选人的个人化程度以及选民的反应。研究发现，不同性别的候选人在塑造个人形象时面临不同的情况，而选民对这些形象的反应也存在差异。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how gender affects the personalization of political candidates and voter responses in Taiwan. It finds that candidates of different genders face varying circumstances in shaping their personal images, and voters respond differently to these images.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注性别在政治传播中的角色，特别是候选人个人化策略与选民互动的性别差异，属于政治传播与性别研究的交叉领域。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the role of gender in political communication, specifically gender differences in candidate personalization strategies and voter interactions, intersecting political communication and gender studies.
